summary: Stood up GitHub Actions CI/CD to Cloudflare Pages, published the repo, created the eugenics.net Cloudflare zone, and registered apex+www Pages custom domains. Apex go-live is now blocked only on updating Dynadot nameservers to the zone's assigned pair.
evidence: Created GitHub repo 7-labs/eugenics-net private-first, verified no secret values or forbidden files in the 269-file tree, then set visibility public; origin remote URL contains no token

Added .github/workflows/deploy.yml: on push to main builds with Node 22 (Astro 6 requires >=22.12.0) via npm ci + npm run build then npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=eugenics-net --branch=main
First CI run 27906165639 failed at build because Node 20 < Astro requirement; fixed by pinning Node 22
CI run 27906217972 succeeded end-to-end; production deployment 1f029f33 created 2026-06-21T13:42:54Z; https://eugenics-net.pages.dev returns HTTP 200 with HSTS, CSP, x-content-type-options, cf-ray
Created Cloudflare zone eugenics.net id 54eb8e263f890bb615569e036fa927ed in account 241fc992 status pending; CF assigned nameservers kristin.ns.cloudflare.com and santino.ns.cloudflare.com
Registered Pages custom domains eugenics.net and www.eugenics.net status pending

Registrar Dynadot delegates to raegan/simon.ns.cloudflare.com which REFUSE eugenics.net (different pair); user must set Dynadot NS to kristin/santino to activate the zone, after which the pending custom domains auto-provision
CF API token and GitHub token were loaded transiently from local.env.txt, never printed or committed; CF credentials stored only as GitHub Actions repository secrets
Residual: Cloudflare Pages 301-redirects .html paths to extensionless and serves rss.xml as application/xml, so scripts/production-smoke.mjs will still flag these after apex activates

summary: Switched all site URLs to the extensionless form to match Cloudflare Pages serving (x.html served at /x; /x.html 308-redirects). Canonical, sitemap, rss, JSON-LD, and every internal link are now extensionless so declared URLs equal served URLs. Also set rss.xml content-type to application/rss+xml. Verified green on the live pages.dev deployment.
evidence: canonicalUrl() strips .html and maps /index to /; sitemap.xml and rss.xml route through it; nav, sections, and all internal hrefs are root-absolute extensionless; on-disk filenames stay x.html (Astro format:file unchanged)
QA scripts updated to expect extensionless canonical/sitemap/links while still reading x.html files; site-integrity link checker resolves /x to x.html
OpenClaw npm run check:all passed: content-quality routes=36 warnings=0, site-integrity routes=36 warnings=5 upstream-link-only, jsonld-validate passed

CI deploy on push to main; https eugenics-net.pages.dev /what-is-eugenics returns 200 with canonical https eugenics.net /what-is-eugenics, the .html form 308-redirects to extensionless, rss.xml served as application/rss+xml
PRODUCTION_BASE_URL set to the pages.dev host: scripts/production-smoke.mjs passed all 20 checks
Extensionless commit used git commit --no-verify with user approval: pre-commit hook false-positive on WHO and UCL citation URL path segments; staged diff had no real secrets
